title: After the Kikuka Sho: The Next Challenge Awaits

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser pulls off a splendid victory!
The crowd is surprised, but there's no shortage of
praise for her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, in the runners' tunnel, Rice Shower
and Mihono Bourbon exchange compliments and
promise to have a rematch in their senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to campus, Matikanetannhauser
sets the spring Tenno Sho as her next major goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to run another long-distance race
between now and spring, so we set the Diamond
Stakes as her next race!
